summary: Out‑of‑phase and unusually fast recording makes listening difficult, but the concert is remembered for an epic 14‑minute Shakedown Street.
review: The tape suffers from serious technical flaws – it sounds out of phase, runs faster than normal and lacks the clarity of a proper soundboard source, which many reviewers found frustrating.  Despite these issues, listeners who recall the show speak highly of its energy, especially noting a memorable 14‑minute "Shakedown Street" that made the night unforgettable.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is praised (epic performance, high enthusiasm) while recording quality is consistently criticized (phase problems, speed issues), yielding a mid‑high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Out of phase, playback runs fast, low fidelity compared to soundboard; difficult for tape‑patching and overall listening experience is compromised.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers focus on the impact of the long Shakedown Street jam.
